fed_stress_test_false_positive.title: Federal Reserve Board announces stress test release date
fed_stress_test_false_positive.description: Federal Reserve Board announces that results from its annual bank stress test will be released on Wednesday, June 24, at 4 p.m. EDT.

fed_rate_decision_true_positive.title: FOMC holds fed funds rate target range unchanged
fed_rate_decision_true_positive.description: The Federal Reserve left its interest rate target range steady following the latest monetary policy meeting.

scotus_ruling_false_positive.description: The Supreme Court released a decision after oral argument on international trade policy.

scotus_resignation_true_positive.description: A major vacancy is opening up on the high court (SCOTUS).

government_shutdown_true_positive.description: Lawmakers remain divided as a federal shutdown funding lapse looms.
